subjective.claim: 58-year-old with a six-year history of low back pain
Constant aching in the lower back radiating into the right buttock, not below the knee
Worse with prolonged sitting and bending forward
Rated around six out of ten most days
Tried physiotherapy and over-the-counter anti-inflammatories with partial relief

objective.claim: Tenderness over the right lower lumbar paraspinals
Forward flexion limited to about 40 degrees
Lower limb strength and reflexes intact

assessment.claim: Chronic mechanical low back pain with right-sided referral
Marked restriction in activities involving prolonged sitting and bending
